evals.prompt: Make a 1 m DTM from these .laz tiles.
expected_behavior: Runs pdal info first; reports density, CRS incl. vertical datum, classes
Denoises before ground classification (SMRF/CSF), audits vendor class 2 on cross-sections
Checks density supports 1 m; processes tiles with buffered edges; hillshade artifact check

evals.prompt: Compute canopy height and tree count for this forest LiDAR.
expected_behavior: Normalizes heights (HAG) against the DTM; pit-free CHM
Tree detection validated against field/manual samples
Reports height percentiles and canopy cover definitions

evals.prompt: Here is a drone photogrammetry point cloud of a forest. Give me the ground elevation model.
expected_behavior: States SfM cannot penetrate canopy — a 'DTM' over forest from SfM is a canopy model
Limits claims accordingly or requests LiDAR

evals.prompt: Audit these LiDAR-derived building heights: tiles mix ellipsoidal and orthometric elevations, strip edges disagree, and the vertical CRS is missing.
expected_behavior: Stops height comparison until horizontal and vertical CRS and geoid transformations are resolved
Checks overlapping strips and tile seams numerically and with cross-sections
Records the verified vertical datum and transformation in output metadata

evals.prompt: Create terrain and canopy products from vendor-classified LAZ files, but there is no report on class quality or point density.
expected_behavior: Profiles density, returns, classes, CRS, and vertical datum before trusting vendor labels
Audits ground classification on representative cross-sections and difficult terrain
Chooses raster resolution from measured density and reports unsupported areas

evals.prompt: Compute slope and watershed boundaries from an existing bare-earth DEM; no point cloud files are available.
expected_behavior: Routes to terrain-hydrology for raster terrain and drainage analysis
Does not require a point-cloud workflow when a DTM is already provided

evals.prompt: Train a deep neural network to segment roofs from RGB orthophotos; there are no LAS or LAZ inputs.
expected_behavior: Routes to geo-deep-learning for imagery segmentation
Does not activate point-cloud-lidar based only on a three-dimensional target concept
